name: blog-test
description: A test to see if i can make a website or not.

scripts.start-html: concurrently "npm run prepare" "npm run server-sync" "npm run sass-dev" "npm run watch-images" "npm run watch-js"
scripts.start-php: concurrently "npm run prepare" "npm run php-server" "npm run server-sync-proxy" "npm run sass-dev" "npm run watch-images" "npm run watch-js"
scripts.prepare: concurrently "npm run sass-prod" "node tools/compress-all-images.js" "npx webpack --config webpack.prod.mjs"

author: Davide Bosco
